clear_sequence: Defer breach (1,8) until entry — early clear lets Y flood col0
Y-expand gap (5-7,34) + spike covers (2-4,27); lock set once complete (Y-click consumes source)
Landing right-only: click (7,8)→(8,8), click (8,8)→(9,8); never expand into col0
G(0,21) DN → y23 → R col9; G UP; climb col9 to y8 (stop before y6 spikes)
Walk to (2,8); clear breach (1,8); L into col0
Strip remaining col0 grav pads (15/19/33/35) while at top — each click removes pad + toggles
Restore gUP via row1 if needed; DN once; freefall (ACTION7) past y38
Never R at y38 (wall); at y39+ R to gem (2,40)
failure_modes: Y refill into (2-4,26) if those cells are re-cleared as Y after BLOCK gone
Clicking col0 grav underfoot mid-fall toggles gUP and resets altitude
R at y38 into wall → death
Early breach clear → Y floods (0,8) shaft
